name: melxis
description: One mind. Many AIs. — shared memory and tasks for AI agents

interface.shortDescription: Coupled memory and tasks for AI agents — Mels and Tasks improve each other
interface.longDescription: Melxis couples memory and tasks for AI agents. Save decisions, root causes, and learnings as Mels in hives (namespaces); track multi-step work as Tasks. Memory and Tasks feed each other — Tasks reference related Mels for context, completed Tasks return insights back to Mels, and the next agent picks up where the last one left off. Skills, hooks, and MCP instructions prompt agents to recall before acting, propose saves after deciding, and extract insights at task closure.
defaultPrompt: Why did we choose the current approach for this module?
Save the root cause of the bug we just fixed.
What tasks are pending in this hive?
